title: Identify an f and g.
text: Look at the parentheses. Can you see an "inner" and "outer" function?

title: Substitute
text: Moving backwards, set the inner function we found, $$h(x)=5-x^2$$, to equal $$x$$ and you could set another function to equal $$\sqrt{x}$$ like $$g(x)=\sqrt{x}$$ so f(x) $$=$$ g(h(x))
